title: LawGuide Law File Schema
description: Schema for law files in the LawGuide repository

id.description: Unique identifier for the law entry, e.g. IPC-302

title.description: Full name/title of the section or article

act.description: Full name of the Act, Code, or Constitution

section.description: Section number, article number, or other reference

jurisdiction.description: Country code in lowercase, e.g. india

category.description: One or more categories: criminal, civil, constitutional, property, family, cyber, etc.

punishment.description: Short description of the punishment, if applicable

tags.description: Searchable keywords related to this law

last_amended.description: Year of last amendment or original enactment

status.description: Current status of the law section

language.description: Language of the content, default is 'en'

short_description.description: One or two sentence plain-language summary of the section
